reference_images.label: umbra_scale_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Tower chamber palette, art deco framing, light beam composition, and shadow contrast anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use ImageBundle above the scale axle and overlay bitmap text for left weight, right weight, current angle, and target angle window.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/ui_scale_readout_panel_220x56.png through AssetServer during floor setup and attach it to the scale readout anchor entity.
runtime_notes: Frames represent neutral, target window, and unlocked states.
Panel follows the scale axle in world space but uses a screen space camera pass for sharp text.
Text uses the bitmap font atlas and updates on every torque recalculation.

context.usage: World anchored panel that shows left and right weights, live tilt angle, and the current target angle window above the scale axle.

shape.silhouette: Compact stepped panel with two upper weight cells, a lower angle strip, and a narrow target window indicator slot.

specs.texture: Dark panel body with gold frame, white number windows, and amber target highlights.
specs.shading: Flat dark plate with brighter gold corners and a teal neutral indicator option.

acceptance_criteria: State sheet is exactly 660x56 px with three 220x56 frames.
Each frame reserves two 72x16 weight cells on the top row and one 180x16 angle strip on the bottom row.
Target state uses an amber highlight band exactly 8 px tall under the angle strip.
